proof_sketch: The mutation modifies the reduction condition in `compute_mean_var_kernel`, which is only called when `training==True`. The test harness never invokes training mode (as shown by 'Training Mode: SKIPPED: operator_not_applicable'), so the mutant code path is never executed. All tested inputs use inference mode, which uses `batchnorm2d_forward_inference_kernel` unaffected by the mutation.
